_comment: Shipped preset for Flux Fill Outpaint. Read ONCE when this workflow's row is first created in DB (see workflow_db._apply_preset_to_new_row) — subsequent seeds skip the preset, so user edits via the sidebar are preserved.
label: Flux Fill Outpaint
description: Outpaint with Flux Fill Dev (fp8). Upstream image lands on LoadImage; main prompt feeds positive CLIPTextEncode. ImagePadForOutpaint widgets (left/top/right/bottom + feathering) are exposed for per-shot tuning. Output is a single image (COMFYTV_IMAGE).

image.error: Outpaint needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's image input.
